message:
✨ Add Nightly E2E Status card to llm-d Benchmarks dashboard (#934)

Report card showing all 9 nightly E2E workflows across llm-d org:
- llm-d/llm-d: inference-scheduling, pd-disaggregation, precise-prefix-cache, wide-ep (OCP & GKE)
- llm-d/llm-d-workload-variant-autoscaler: WVA E2E (OCP)
- llm-d/llm-d-benchmark: nightly benchmarks (OCP & GKE)

Features:
- Overall health badge (Healthy/Degraded/Failed)
- Stats bar: pass rate, passing, failing, not run, total
- 7-day trend bars per workflow with pass rate %
- Platform breakdown (OCP vs GKE)
- GitHub API integration with token from profile
- Demo data fallback when no token configured

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
